notes: Attendance fields (tapr_att_*, tapr_chronic_abs_*) have measure_year=2024 because TEA distributes 2024 attendance data in the 2024-25 TAPR release.
TEA masking codes -1/-2/-3 and blank values are all stored as null. The tapr_suppression_codes column preserves the original per-campus codes.

Teacher turnover, teacher certification, LRE/inclusion, DAEP rate, ISS, OSS, expulsion, restraint, and seclusion are excluded because they are not present in the verified 2024-25 TAPR campus files (see research/tapr_discovery.md).
CRDC 2021-22 fields added. Data are historical (2021-22). Sentinel -9 = not applicable; 0 = real zero. No data-quality suppression was applied by ED for 2021-22.
Phase 4 (2025 accountability + ArcGIS 2024-25 coordinates) fields added.

fields.description: TAPR release year (2025 = 2024-25 TAPR). Attendance and chronic-absence fields refer to measure_year=2024; all other TAPR fields refer to measure_year=2025.
True if this campus appeared in at least one of the three TAPR statewide files; False if not found (all TAPR fields will be null).

JSON object mapping original TAPR field name to the suppression code for any field that was masked or blank for this campus. Codes: -1 (small denominator), -2 (invalid/improbable), -3 (complementary suppression), 'blank' (empty cell). Null if no fields were suppressed.

fields.description: CRDC collection year (2021-22). Data are historical; they reflect conditions from the 2021-22 school year, not the current year. Do not compare CRDC counts directly with current-year TAPR rates.
True if this campus NCES school ID (nces_school_id) matched a COMBOKEY in the CRDC 2021-22 school files. False if the school was not found (all CRDC fields null).
JSON object mapping original CRDC field name to '-9' for any field whose value was -9 (not applicable / not reported). Null if no fields were suppressed for this campus.

fields.notes: Values: A, B, C, D, F, 'Not Rated'. Null if campus not in file. 'Not Rated' is a real TEA designation (new schools, DAEP campuses, etc.); it is NOT equivalent to missing data.

fields.description: Derived accountability status. 'Rated' when C_RATING is A/B/C/D/F; 'Not Rated' when C_RATING is 'Not Rated'; null when campus is not in the 2025 accountability file.

fields.notes: Null for 'Not Rated' campuses and for unmatched campuses.

fields.description: TEA accountability release year (2025) for all rows.
True if this campus_id matched a CAMPUS row in the 2025 TEA campus accountability file. False if the campus is not in that file (all accountability fields null).
Campus latitude (WGS84 decimal degrees, from ArcGIS point geometry).
fields.notes: Geocoder output from a 2024-25 ArcGIS snapshot derived from AskTED. For display and approximate mapping only. Dallas schools expected in range [32.5, 33.2].

fields.description: Campus longitude (WGS84 decimal degrees, from ArcGIS point geometry).
fields.notes: Geocoder output from a 2024-25 ArcGIS snapshot derived from AskTED. For display and approximate mapping only. Dallas schools expected in range [-97.2, -96.4].

fields.description: Source of the latitude/longitude coordinates. 'TEA ArcGIS Schools 2024-25' for matched campuses; null if unmatched.
ArcGIS layer school year (2024-25) for all rows.
True if this campus_id matched a feature in the ArcGIS Schools 2024-25 layer. False if the campus has no ArcGIS feature (latitude/longitude null).
